overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character exploring a futuristic dystopian urban plaza with neon signage, entering a construction site beneath a building, and descending into an underground tunnel. The environment features palm trees, futuristic glass architecture, and transitions between bright sunlight and shadowed interiors.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with neon signage

events.description: character passes a pedestrian in a pink jacket walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking through the sunlit plaza toward the large City of Sin billboard

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in pink jacket walking across the plaza

entered.detail: large vertical digital billboard with red neon text reading City of Sin
massive spherical glass structure dominating the skyline
tall palm trees scattered throughout the plaza
futuristic elevated roadway with green structural elements
tall building with smoke rising from the upper floors

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a bright, sunlit futuristic plaza with the iconic City of Sin billboard and a massive spherical building visible ahead. Palm trees line the walkway as a few pedestrians and vehicles move through the open space.

events.description: approaching the construction building entrance with yellow scaffolding
beginning to ascend the concrete stairs into the construction area

agents.ego_description: walking up the stairs into the construction area beneath the building

notable_agents.action: armed guard standing near the parked military vehicle

entered.detail: extensive yellow metal scaffolding surrounding the building entrance
wide concrete staircase leading up into the building
armored military truck parked near the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a building under construction, passing a military vehicle and ascending concrete stairs surrounded by yellow scaffolding. The lighting shifts to partial shade as the building overhang blocks the direct sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior construction zone with debris and scaffolding

events.description: entering the shadowed interior with fluorescent ceiling lights becoming visible
navigating through debris-filled area with construction materials scattered around

agents.ego_description: navigating through the cluttered interior construction space beneath the building

notable_agents.action: construction worker standing near a pile of rubble

entered.detail: massive angled concrete beams supporting the structure above
long rectangular fluorescent light panels emitting cyan light
industrial metal racks holding construction supplies
piles of concrete rubble and broken materials

segments.scene_description: Inside the construction zone, the character moves through a dimly lit space with fluorescent ceiling lights, concrete support beams, and scattered debris. The environment is sheltered from the weather with construction materials and equipment visible throughout.

events.description: exiting the covered construction area back into bright sunlight
turning right to navigate around the plaza toward the tunnel entrance

agents.ego_description: exiting the building and walking around the open plaza toward an underground entrance

entered.detail: transparent elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings
low concrete wall with graffiti and murals

segments.scene_description: The character emerges back into the sunlit plaza, with the City of Sin billboard and spherical building visible again in the distance. The camera moves past an elevated glass walkway and approaches a dark tunnel entrance descending underground.

events.description: entering the dark tunnel with only emergency lighting visible

agents.ego_description: walking down the stairs into the dark underground tunnel

entered.detail: black and white painted murals depicting figures on the concrete walls
long dark corridor extending into the distance with dim lighting
small green and white lights illuminating the tunnel floor

segments.scene_description: The character descends into a dark underground tunnel, leaving the bright plaza behind. The walls feature distinctive black and white murals, and the space is dimly lit by emergency lights as the corridor extends into the darkness ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, sunlit futuristic plaza through a shadowed construction zone and finally into a dark underground tunnel. It begins by traversing an open walkway lined with palm trees, moving toward a massive spherical building and the iconic City of Sin billboard. As the character approaches a building under construction, the scene shifts from direct sunlight to partial shade, ascending concrete stairs and yellow scaffolding before entering a dimly lit interior filled with fluorescent lights and concrete beams. The camera then emerges back into the brilliance of the plaza, passing an elevated glass walkway before turning toward a descending tunnel entrance. Finally, the environment transforms into a dark subterranean corridor, leaving the city light behind to reveal black and white murals illuminated by dim emergency lighting.
